CustomField.description: Display image depending on record type
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_ThirdParty", NOT(ispickval(Type,"Competitor"))) , IMAGE('/resource/ThirdPartyImage', 'Third Party'), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_Distributor" , IMAGE('/resource/DistributorImage', 'Distributor'), IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_ThirdParty", ispickval(Type,"Competitor")), IMAGE('/resource/CompetitorImage', 'Competitor') , IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_Prospect" , IMAGE('/resource/ProspectImage', 'Prospect') , IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_GlobalAccount" , IMAGE('/resource/GlobalAccountImage', 'GAM') , "" )))))
